iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 9% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 19 (00:00 UTC) — DETERRENT. Gabbard backs Trump's threat determination after NCTC Director Kent resigned (said Iran posed 'no imminent threat'). No nuclear enrichment escalation. Zero nuclear test indicators. War continues but nuclear track stable/dampened. Kent resignation actually reduces nuclear justification credibility.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 19 (00:00 UTC) — IMMINENT. Iran launches new ballistic missile volley at Israel (March 18): 2 killed in Ramat Gan/Tel Aviv, 8 impact sites. BUT missile volume declining from ~100/day (first days) to single digits. IDF confirms 11 US soldiers killed, 2 IDF + 11 civilians killed, 3,440+ injured in Israel. Drones target US diplomatic facility in Baghdad. 12+ MQ-9 Reapers lost. Trump's Hormuz operation could extend war by 2 months. No allied escorts committed. Larijani confirmed killed, IDF vows to hunt Mojtaba Khamenei. Oil >$100. War continues at high intensity but Iranian strike capability degrading.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 20 auto - % (up). Day 19 (00:00 UTC) — IMMINENT. IDF launches large-scale preemptive strikes on Hezbollah rocket launchers. IDF warns of 'larger-than-standard' overnight Hezbollah barrage incoming. Evacuation orders for south Lebanon. 886 killed in Lebanon (67 women, 111 children), 1M+ displaced. Israel Katz: no return for displaced Lebanese. 'Limited' ground operations expanding. Guardian/Merz calls offensive an 'error'. Hezbollah targets Nahariya, shrapnel at Jerusalem holy sites. Major escalation imminent.

NATO bolstering Incirlik ballistic missile defense. Kurecik radar likely primary target. Turkey deployed F-16s to Northern Cyprus. No new incidents in past 24h. Stable.

PBS: most severe fighting between neighbors since Taliban takeover.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 18 18:00): ZERO de-escalation signals. Iran FM calls diplomacy 'delusional'. Hormuz effectively blockaded. Israel wide-scale strikes on Tehran. Lebanon ground invasion expanding. Oil >$100. No ceasefire in ANY theater.

latest_news.headline: Iran confirms Larijani + Basij commander Soleimani killed — 'day of mourning' declared
latest_news.text: Iran state media confirms SNSC head Ali Larijani and Basij commander Gholamreza Soleimani killed in overnight Israeli strikes. Iran declares day of mourning. Initially attempted to deny with handwritten note from Larijani.

latest_news.headline: Iran launches missiles at Israeli forces near Lebanon border — fresh Tehran strikes overnight
latest_news.text: Iranian media reports Tehran launched wave of missiles at Israeli forces operating in and around Lebanon border. IDF hits Tehran with fresh strikes overnight. Simultaneous escalation on two fronts.

latest_news.headline: US State Department orders ALL worldwide embassies to conduct immediate security review
latest_news.text: State Dept memo signed by SecState Rubio orders ALL US embassies worldwide to immediately convene emergency action committee and review security posture. Cites 'ongoing and developing situation in the Middle East and potential for spill-over effects.'

latest_news.headline: UK national security adviser thought Iran deal was 'within reach' days before war
latest_news.text: UK NSA Jonathan Powell attended final US-Iran Geneva talks, believed Iranian offer was 'surprising' and significant enough to prevent war. US and Israel launched attack two days after talks ended. Raises questions about intelligence and diplomatic decision-making.

latest_news.headline: Trump: US 'not ready to leave yet' but will leave Iran 'in the near future'
latest_news.text: Trump tells Sky News US is 'not ready to leave yet' but will withdraw 'in the near future.' Says he's 'not really afraid of anything.' Contradicts earlier claims of swift operation.

latest_news.headline: Europe rejects Trump's Hormuz coalition demands — no allied military commitments
latest_news.text: European leaders largely resist Trump's demands for warships to reopen Strait of Hormuz. Trump pivots: 'US doesn't need NATO's help and never did.' Unilateral approach confirmed. US striking Iranian anti-ship positions along Hormuz shores.

latest_news.headline: Israel ground operations expanding in Lebanon — UK and allies 'gravely concerned'
latest_news.text: Israel announces 'limited and targeted ground operations' against Hezbollah strongholds in south Lebanon. UK and allies express grave concern. Residents told they will be displaced until Israel feels northern border secure.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 18, 23:04 UTC) — War continues across 5 active theaters. 1,444 killed in Iran, 18,551 wounded. 1M+ displaced in Lebanon. Brent $106. Japan releases oil reserves. Germany opposes Lebanon ground offensive. Trump goes unilateral on Hormuz. No ceasefire signals in any theater. NATO bolsters Incirlik defenses.

predictions.description: Strait of Hormuz expected to remain under Iranian blockade. Additional shipping attacks probable within 12 hours.
Israeli ground operation in southern Lebanon expected to continue beyond Litani River. Further displacement and infrastructure destruction likely.
Status quo maintained. No PLA activity changes detected. Taiwan Strait remains stable.
PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN remains stable at current levels. No significant changes anticipated.
